reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, los baños se encontraban en condiciones. Lastima que había falta de algunos combustibles.
Algo que estaría bueno que implementen es el pago con QR dentro del local. Esto facilita mucho más los pagos.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, the bathrooms were in good condition. It's a shame there was a shortage of some fuel.
Something that would be great if they implemented QR codes for payments inside the establishment. This makes payments much easier.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdnJhN1ZnEAE

reviews.comment:
El personal atiende muy bien pero es extremadamente escaso. Trabajan a destajo. CUIDADO a las 22 cierran el bar. Es decir llegáis al medio de la meseta luego de hs de andar y no podés comprar ni para comer ni para beber. Solo hay servicios para el móvil y no para las persona a. Solo unos vos no muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
The staff is very helpful but extremely understaffed. They work incredibly hard. Be aware that the bar closes at 10 PM. This means you arrive in the middle of the plateau after hours of walking and can't buy anything to eat or drink. There are only mobile phone restrooms, not for people. And the restrooms aren't very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdnNxb1pREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente experiencia
Atienden bien!!!! La comida al paso bien servida y no muy cara. Me encantó que el muchacho que atiende va diciendo en voz alta los precios de los productos. Una señora dejó unas papas fritas de tarrito porque realmente son carísimas!!! Pero la comida allí es económica y rica!!! Los sandwiches de miga son exquisitos de marca Argentina paturuzu

(Translated by Google)
Excellent experience! The service is great! The fast food is well-served and not too expensive. I loved that the young man serving announced the prices of the items aloud. One lady left some canned chips because they're really expensive! But the food there is affordable and delicious! The sandwiches de miga are exquisite, made by the Argentinian brand Paturuzu.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtM3Atd3JBRRAB
